creator: aplsms@gmail.com
text:
Synaptics support doesn't work on FreeBSD. But works fine with linux
and windows on the same hardware.

#cat /boot/loader.conf
opensolaris_load="YES"
zfs_load="YES"
vfs.root.mountfrom="zfs:zroot"
sem_load="YES"
sound_load="YES"
snd_ich_load="YES"
snd_hda_load="YES"
hw.psm.synaptics_support=1


#sysctl hw.psm
hw.psm.tap_timeout: 125000
hw.psm.tap_threshold: 25
